nodes.text: Good evening. After a long day lets review how it went.
How do you feel your overall day went?
Thats Good! What do you feel Went the best today?

options.text: I Was all planned and prepared

nodes.text: Oh, What did you do when things didn't go well?

options.text: Looked for what I could control
Waited for someone to fix it

nodes.text: When facing a challenge, what did you focus on?

options.text: Why this is happening to me
How Can I get away from it?
Who is responsible for the problem

nodes.text: Notice how you approached control today. Some moments showed ownership, others may have felt outside your control. Awareness of this balance is the first step to shifting it.
Let’s shift from how you handled situations to what you contributed.
Which moment you feel standed out most today?

options.text: I helped someone without being asked
I did my work as expected
I felt I deserved more Appriciation
I noticed others not contributing enough

nodes.text: What motivated your actions most today?
Think about where your focus was today — on giving or receiving. prioritising giving over receiving is is appriciable in itself.
Now, let’s widen the lens beyond just yourself.
When you think about today’s challenges, who comes to mind?
What influenced your decisions most today?
Your perspective shapes your experience, And expanding you perspective to include others always bring more clarity, connection and meaning.

Today’s reflection shows patterns in ownership, contribution, and perspective. Making sure that your problem/happiness is yours to experience is a great way of handling the day. Your contribution towards your team also results in a happy day.
You always have a chance to make the 'tommorow' better than 'today', So see you tommorow!.
